channel.title: Summary on What's done is done
channel.description: Recent content in Summary on What's done is done

item.title: OpenStack Summit 2018 Vancouver Summary from QA perspective
item.description:
Introduction

This is a summary of the OpenStack Summit 2018 Vancouver from the QA perspective. I had three subject to attend the summit.

  1. To participate the OpenStack Upstream Institute
  2. To attend the forum sessions (mainly QA related) and have conversations with QA people
  3. To give talks at the lightning talk and the QA forum session
  4. To meet and say hello in person and/or have lunch/dinner/drinks

QA Summary

There were a lot of QA related talks at the summit. I could attend some of them.

Forum

  • QA Tooling
  • On boarding
  • …?

Others

  • Keynotes
  • openDev
  • any others?

Happy Hacking!
